# BP-110 negative: Gin checks the ShouldBindJSON error before continuing.
lang: go
file: BP-110-safe.go
variant: gin
---
package sample

import "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"

type Login struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
}

func login(c *gin.Context) {
	var request Login
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&request); err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(400)
		return
	}
	use(request)
}

func use(Login) {}
